_comment: Merge these keys into ~/.claude/settings.json to wire Claude Code to the Beacon hub (127.0.0.1:8765, ClaudeCodeBridge). ESSENTIAL for the buddy round-trip: the PermissionRequest hook + statusLine. PermissionRequest fires ONLY when a tool actually needs permission (Write, Edit, Bash, MCP, ...) -- unlike PreToolUse, which fires on EVERY tool and would block routine reads if held open. SessionStart/Stop/Notification are optional (running count + activity feed). timeout is in SECONDS; PermissionRequest is 35 to cover the device's ~25s decision window. If you already have other hooks for these events, ADD these as additional array entries -- do not overwrite. (PreToolUse with a narrow matcher like "Bash" is the back-compat alternative; the bridge still accepts it.)
